title: Beehiiv vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv vs Klaviyo email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which is best for newsletters or ecommerce.
intro: Both Beehiiv and Klaviyo are powerful email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences with distinct strengths. Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter creators and publishers, while Klaviyo specializes in ecommerce automation. Choosing between them depends on your business model and specific marketing needs.
choose_a_if: You're a newsletter creator or independent publisher looking to monetize your audience
You want a generous free tier with up to 2,500 subscribers at no cost
You value an affiliate program with 50% first-year commissions for referrals
choose_b_if: You run an ecommerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce and need deep platform integrations
You need SMS marketing capabilities in addition to email campaigns
You want predictive analytics and advanced segmentation for customer behavior

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—they excel in different areas. Beehiiv is superior for newsletter publishers with its monetization features and larger free tier, while Klaviyo is better for ecommerce businesses requiring advanced automation and SMS marketing. Your choice should depend on your specific business model.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Klaviyo?
faq.a: Beehiiv starts at $39/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month, making it slightly cheaper. However, Beehiiv's free tier supports 2,500 subscribers versus Klaviyo's 500, so Beehiiv offers better value for growing publishers before you need to upgrade.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list imports, so you can migrate your subscriber data from Klaviyo to Beehiiv. However, your automation workflows and customizations won't transfer automatically—you'll need to rebuild these in your new platform.
